section.heading: Short title

content.p: This subpart may be cited as the “Paul D. Coverdell Teacher Protection Act of 2001”.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title VIII, § 8551, formerly title II, § 2361, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title II, § 201, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1667; renumbered title IX, § 9541, renumbered title VIII, § 8551, Pub. L. 114–95, title II, § 2001(a)(3)(A), (B), (D), title VIII, § 8001(a)(7), Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 1913, 2088, 2089.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was classified to section 6731 of this title prior to renumbering by Pub. L. 114–95.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 7941, Pub. L. 89–10, title IX, § 9601, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title IX, § 901, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1985, which related to evaluations, was renumbered section 8601 of title VIII of Pub. L. 89–10 by Pub. L. 114–95, title VIII, § 8001(a)(10), Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2088, 2089, and transferred to section 7981 of this title.
